red_lines: Loss of Cuban Communist Party control
core_narratives: Resistance to US imperialism and blockade
Socialist achievements in healthcare and education

decision_history.event_description: Unprecedented mass protests in 2021 driven by economic crisis
decision_history.decision_taken: Combination of internet shutdowns, arrests of protest leaders, and limited economic concessions (private SME legalization)
decision_history.outcome: Protests suppressed, emigration wave accelerated, some economic opening

decision_history.event_description: Severe energy crisis and economic deterioration
decision_history.decision_taken: Sought emergency fuel supplies from Russia and Mexico, allowed expanded private sector
decision_history.outcome: Partial crisis management, continued emigration, growing dependency on external support

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Communist Party, military enterprises (GAESA), older revolutionary generation

military_posture.force_disposition: minimal external capability, focused on internal stability
